5aaf8cdedc25.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
5aaf8cdedc25.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
5aaf8cdedc25.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

2db40992d6c1.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
2db40992d6c1.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

03ebc4ac9376.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
03ebc4ac9376.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
03ebc4ac9376.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

897b8618e385.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
897b8618e385.description: At 133 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
